			.site-footer-wrap {
	background-color: #FFF;
}		

#menu-item-25344 a {
  color:#ff0000;
}
.hero-section {
  position: relative;
  height: 60vh;
}

.cb-hero-box {
  position: absolute;
  left: 10px;
  bottom: 115px;

  max-width: 520px;
  width: 90%;

  padding: 10px 20px;

  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35);  /* LIGHT GLASS */

  border-radius: 20px;
  text-align: center;
  box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
}

.cb-hero-title {
  font-size: 24px;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 25px;
}

.cb-btn {
  display: block;
  padding: 20px;
  margin: 18px 0;
  text-decoration: none;
  border-radius: 50px;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.cb-btn-male {
  background: linear-gradient(to right, #cfe3ff, #a8c8ff);
  color: #1f2d3d;
}

.cb-btn-female {
  background: linear-gradient(to right, #ffd1dc, #ffb6c1);
  color: #1f2d3d;
}

.cb-btn span {
  display: block;
}

.cb-line1 {
  font-size: 20px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.cb-line2 {
  font-size: 16px;
  margin-top: 4px;
}

.cb-trust {
  margin-top: 20px;
  font-size: 15px;
}

.cb-login {
  margin-top: 20px;
}

.cb-login a {
  color: #d62828;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: underline;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .cb-hero-box {
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    bottom: 20px;
    width: 90%;
  }
}


    * {
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    body {
    background: #484545;
    padding: 1px;
    }

    .containerx {
    list-style: none;
    column-gap: 0;
    column-count: 5;
    }

    .cardx {
        width: 100%;
        height: auto;
        break-inside: avoid;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        text-align: left;
        padding-right: 20px;
    }
    .single-content ul {
        padding-left: 0px;
        margin-left: 40px;
    }


    @media (min-width: 320px) and (max-width: 759.5px) {
    .containerx {
        column-count: 2;
    }
    }
    @media (min-width: 760px) and (max-width: 979.5px) {
    .containerx {
        column-count: 3;
    }
    }
    @media (min-width: 980px) and (max-width: 1023.5px) {
    .containerx {
        column-count: 4;
    }
    }
    @media (min-width: 1024px) {
    .containerx {
        column-count: 5;
    }
    }
